creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This doesn't following the instructions on how to submit a new port, specifically it needs to be delivered as a "shar" file:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

However, since you provided a stage-qa poudriere testlog, I'm going to give you extra-credit and go ahead and promote the PR anyway.

In the future, please following the instructions outline in the link above.  Currently they say "shar" is the only option.
